repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Includes annual reports, proposals, correspondence, conference proceedings, subject files, and course material relating to Pinstrup-Andersen's career.

dao.xlink:title: Per Pinstrup-Andersen, Science and Policy Priorities for the Global Food System

daodesc.p: Per Pinstrup-Andersen, Science and Policy Priorities for the Global Food System

dao.xlink:title: Foredrag Med Per Pinstrup Andersen På Skærum Mølle

daodesc.p: Foredrag Med Per Pinstrup Andersen På Skærum Mølle

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Per Pinstrup-Andersen is the H. E. Babcock Professor of Food, Nutrition and Public Policy, the J. Thomas Clark Professor of Entrepreneurship, and Professor of Applied Economics at Cornell University and a Danish economist and policy maker who won the 2001 World Food Prize for personally initiated the research effort which enabled several governments to reform their food subsidy programs and dramatically increase food availability to the severely impoverished. He has a B.S. from the Danish Agricultural University, a M.S. and Ph.D from Oklahoma State University.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes annual reports, proposals, correspondence, conference proceedings, subject files, and course material relating to Pinstrup-Andersen's career.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Per Pinstrup-Andersen Papers, #29-2-4133. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

relatedmaterial.head: Related Materials
relatedmaterial.p: See also collections #47-10-3394 and #29-1-3247 for additional biographical information.

did.unittitle: Annual reports, curricula vitae, correspondence, awards, conferences

"Food Policy for Developing Countries: The Role of Government in Global, National and Local Food Systems" - set of four DVDs (DVD #1447, 1761-1763), DVD of Pinstrup-Andersen's Publications (DVD #1448) and Publications by Pinstrup-Andersen in Spanish (paper format)

did.unittitle: Publications by Pinstrup-Andersen in English and Danish and in chronological order
Publications by Pinstrup-Andersen in chronological order
Articles where Pinstrup-Andersen is cited and some of his publications grouped by decades, correspondence and photographs
Videotapes (V-9151-9179), programs, event flyers, World Food Prize memos and correspondence
